F(wnk)=F1(wn2k)+wnkF2(wn2k)=F1(wn2k)+wnkF2(wn2k)\begin{align}F(w_n^k) &= F_1(w_n^{2k}) + w_n^kF_2(w_n^{2k})\\&=F_1(w_{\frac n2}^k) + w_n^kF_2(w_{\frac n2}^k)\end{align}F(wnkŌĆŗ)ŌĆŗ=F1ŌĆŗ(wn2kŌĆŗ)+wnkŌĆŗF2ŌĆŗ(wn2kŌĆŗ)=F1ŌĆŗ(w2nŌĆŗkŌĆŗ)+wnkŌĆŗF2ŌĆŗ(w2nŌĆŗkŌĆŗ)ŌĆŗŌĆŗ

entry.content:
Statement

Statement
